title: Seunguk & Jiwon
invitationMessage: Together with their families, Seunguk Kim and Jiwon Seo invite you to celebrate as they exchange vows and begin their next chapter together.

ui.heroMessage: Join us for a joyful ceremony, dinner, and a beautiful evening of celebration.
ui.galleryNote: A few favorite frames from the season that brought us here.
ui.accountNote: If you are unable to attend, we have included bank details below.
ui.rsvpNote: Your reply helps us prepare for the day.

ceremony.description: Ceremony begins at 1:00 PM, with dinner and celebration to follow.

transport.title: Subway
transport.body: The venue is a 3-minute walk from Exit 5 of City Hall Station on Lines 1 and 2.

transport.title: Parking
transport.body: Complimentary parking is available for up to 2 hours in the building garage.

transport.title: Reception Meal
transport.body: A meal will be served in the banquet hall on the same floor after the ceremony.

transport.title: Shuttle
transport.body: A shuttle runs every 20 minutes from Exit 3 of Seoul Station.

notices.title: Photo Zone
notices.body: A photo wall will be ready at the entrance for you to enjoy.

notices.title: With Children
notices.body: A nursing room and resting area will be available for guests coming with children.

notices.title: Program
notices.body: A short thank-you and cake cutting will follow the ceremony.

notices.title: Blessing Gifts
notices.body: Bank details are shared below for guests who are unable to attend in person.

gallery.title: Engagement Afternoon
gallery.caption: The start of a season we never wanted to rush through.

gallery.title: Weekend Escape
gallery.caption: A favorite frame from the ordinary days that turned into something more.

gallery.title: City Light
gallery.caption: A little glimpse of the rhythm we built together.

gallery.title: Winter Dinner
gallery.caption: The kind of evening we wish we could keep replaying forever.

gallery.title: By the Water
gallery.caption: One of the quiet moments that still feels like home to us.

gallery.title: Always Us
gallery.caption: A final little preview before the day we say yes in front of everyone we love.

timeline.title: The beginning felt easy in the best way
timeline.body: What started as a simple conversation slowly became the part of every day we looked forward to most.

timeline.title: The ordinary days became the ones we wanted to keep
timeline.body: Weekend walks, long dinners, and familiar laughter turned into a life that already felt shared.

timeline.title: Now we get to celebrate the next chapter
timeline.body: We cannot wait to gather with the people we love most and begin married life together.

rsvp.adminLabel: You can review and manage replies from the editor.
